name: Mashed Potato Turnip
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop the turnips into small cubes.
2. Peel and cut the potatoes into chunks.
3. Place the vegetables, minced garlic, salt, and pepper in a large pot.
4. Add enough water to cover the ingredients by about an inch.
5. Bring to a boil over high heat.
6. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer until the turnips and potatoes are tender (about 20-25 minutes).
7. Drain the vegetables, reserving some of the cooking liquid if desired for adding milk.
8. Transfer the cooked vegetables to a large bowl.
9. Mash with a potato masher or fork until smooth.
10. Gradually add milk while continuing to mash until reaching the desired consistency.
11. Season with additional salt and pepper to taste.
12. Serve hot.
